scope: AgenC agents/thread.ts ↔ Codex V2 agent thread behavior. AgenC's AgentThread is a high-level wrapper around a single LiveAgent handle. Lifecycle delegation, fork-mode passthrough, and isFinal-driven join semantics are Codex parity surfaces and locked here. OpenClaude-shaped public conveniences are separate presentation/API compatibility surfaces and must not alter the Codex V2 behavior rows.

requiredBehaviors: AgentThread holds exactly one LiveAgent handle (this.liveHandle) plus fork metadata
matches codex CodexThread holding exactly one Codex (per-conversation engine) at codex-rs/core/src/codex_thread.rs:87-93
rebindLive replaces the live handle when the registry hands the wrapper a new instance after restart/recovery without losing subscriber set
threadId/agentPath/nickname accessors pass through to liveHandle
fork() defaults forkMode to { kind: 'full_history' } when caller omits it
matches codex SpawnAgentForkMode::FullHistory at codex-rs/core/src/agent/control.rs:48 as the canonical 'inherit parent history' value
caller can override forkMode (including to last_n_turns)
spawn() forwards caller-supplied forkMode and defaults to undefined (no fork)
matches codex Option<SpawnAgentForkMode>::None at codex-rs/core/src/agent/control.rs:55 — child starts fresh from task directive only
caller can override to either full_history or last_n_turns
join() resolves only after status reaches a final state per isFinal (completed/errored/shutdown/not_found)
matches codex's is_final policy at codex-rs/core/src/agent/status.rs (locked separately by codex-status-parity#is-final-policy)
interrupted is intentionally non-final: a join() observer keeps watching past an interrupt until the next terminal state arrives
fast paths: pre-captured wiring.initialResult and wiring.joinPromise short-circuit the watcher when they exist
onStatusChange replays current status synchronously to a new subscriber and forwards subsequent transitions via liveHandle.status.subscribe
matches codex tokio::watch semantics on the AgentStatusTracker (locked separately by codex-status-parity#agent-status-tracker)
rebindLive re-binds the underlying subscription to the replacement LiveAgent without dropping AgentThread-level listeners
synthesizeResult maps completed→{ outcome: 'completed', finalMessage? }, errored→{ outcome: 'errored', error }, shutdown→{ outcome: 'aborted' }
default arm covers any other terminal state by returning outcome: 'aborted' so callers always get a typed RunAgentResult

outcome strings are AgenC's internal RunAgentResult shape (consumed by delegate.ts); not codex's wire-level AgentStatusJson — the codex-aligned mapping is the input enum (status.status), not the output literals

approvedExceptions.reason: Allows TypeScript top-type annotations and Codex not-recognized error assertions; behavior rows remain required.
